meta.description: Maps URL domains to outlet_id. Fetched by the CanScan extension and site to resolve the current tab's outlet to a nutrition label. Join key: domain -> outlet_id -> outlet-database.json.
meta.note: outlet_ids must exactly match outlet-database.json (kebab-case). Brand-level domains (e.g. calgaryherald.com) map to the parent outlet_id until brand-level records exist.
